content:
Perplexity has introduced Personal Computer, a new Mac feature that enables AI to operate across local files, native apps, and the browser. This advancement shifts AI focus from just text generation to accessing the real tools and data where work happens.

• Personal Computer acts as an orchestrator, integrating with local folders, native Mac apps like Mail and Calendar, and browser workflows from one interface.  
• It enables AI to read and write files, manage tasks, and maintain context across multiple platforms simultaneously.  
• Setting it up on a Mac mini allows 24/7 operation, with remote task initiation and 2FA approval via iPhone.  
• Local access unlocks AI utility in messy, real-world workflows—like unfinished docs, spreadsheets, and inboxes—often missed by cloud-only tools.
